title: Text search items across specific boards
excerpt:
Hi 
I want to be able to keyword search across a set of specific boards. I’d like the ability to type a search keyword(s) and then have matching items from specific boards displayed for me. What is the right thing to do …

posts.author: msaqib (Muhammad Saqib Ilyas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I want to be able to keyword search across a set of specific boards. I’d like the ability to type a search keyword(s) and then have matching items from specific boards displayed for me. What is the right thing to do for this? Create a view? Create a form? Use the API? Any pointers would be helpful.
Thanks
Saqib

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @msaqib - you can use the “Search Everything” function to search test across boards. Just click the search icon in the task bar:

image1787×242 13.7 KB

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: msaqib (Muhammad Saqib Ilyas)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Mark. I need to limit the search to a few specific boards. Otherwise, there’d be too much noise in the results. Would I have to resort to the API and write some code to do that?
